blocks.text: Title night: Barça can go nine clear, City can level Arsenal
City beat Arsenal on Sunday and trail by just three points. Win tonight at Turf Moor and they're level at 70. Meanwhile Barcelona, six clear of Real Madrid, host a Celta side with little to prove.
♟️ Thu 17:15 — Carlsen opens knockout playoffs at Chess.com Open
🎮 Thu 17:00 — rain & 100 Thieves vs BIG — CCT Global Finals
